violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice deflector shield in the large ice bin was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Wire shelving units in the walk-in cooler and the blade cover for the portable fan were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. Hand washing sink in the back prep area was found dirty. Sink should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean utensils and lids were found stored in dirty containers during inspection. Clean utensils and equipment should be stored in a clean location.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
